description: Composition Blue round neck sweater made of 100% acrylic, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleach Dry flat in shade Cool iron This soft sweater from jealous 21 is so plush it will seem like you never left the comfort of your cosy blanket. Smart enough to wear with a shirt or wear this with leggings or form fitting denims and boots. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
